caption: A man is seated in a studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and a tall, silver-grey wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a white shirt on a mannequin and a yellow garment with "LEE" printed on it. On-screen graphics are visible on both sides of the man; on the left is a logo that says "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and on the right is a logo that says "BOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expressions and head posture as he talks.
